title: Head Bump Resurrected
description: Inflicts damage when the player hits their head on the ceiling.
body:
This is a port of the [Head Bump](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/head-bump) mod by [
stephenb6174](https://legacy.curseforge.com/members/stephenb6174/projects).

With this mod you will take damage when your head hits the ceiling. Wearing a helmet prevents damage but loses durability.

Through the datapack you can customize which blocks will not deal damage. By default these are all soft blocks, plants, blocks that you can walk through, blocks that do not touch the floor. If you find a vanilla block that shouldn't be damaging but isn't in the config, message me in discord: jaimarl

It will not be ported to Fabric or pre 1.18.2 Forge.
